reviews.text: “E & N delivers excellent tax preparation and tax strategy guidance. Professional, reliable, and truly focused on helping clients keep more of what they earn. I started using their services in 2023 and it has been second to none!”
I've never had a tax preparer who was this attentive and thorough. Marija gives you her full attention, answers every question, and clearly loves what she does. Highly recommend.
If you need help with your taxes Marija is the person to go with. She has been doing my taxes for years I can’t explain how helpful she is. Always explaining everything and answering all my questions

Marija has been handling my taxes for several years, and I can’t recommend her highly enough. She is extremely knowledgeable, detail-oriented, and consistently makes the entire process easy and stress-free. Her professionalism, responsiveness, and genuine care for her clients truly set her apart. I completely trust her with my taxes and wouldn’t go anywhere else. If you’re looking for someone exceptional, Marija is the one!
